description: Week 7. close_session flags elbow_pain=6. Week 5 already had elbow flag in DAILY_SUMMARIES. Tests full escalation chain: close_day detects injury → weekly_eval propagates → monthly_eval catches cross-week pattern.

mock_llm_responses.close_day_0: {"date": "2026-03-23", "week": 7, "session": {"completed": true, "label": "Day 2", "rpe_avg": 8.0, "effort_quality": "moderate", "notable": "Elbow pain 6/10 during chin-ups — flagged"}, "health": {"sleep_hrs": 7.0, "bw_kg": 85.0, "steps": null, "readiness_score": 65}, "events": [{"type": "concern", "category": "INJURY", "text": "Elbow pain 6/10 — above threshold, injury escalation required"}], "escalation_check": "injury", "markov_note": "Elbow pain recurrence — second flag this month"}
mock_llm_responses.weekly_eval_0: {"week": 7, "closed": "2026-03-23", "training": {"sessions_done": 1, "avg_effort_quality": "moderate", "volume_achieved": "partial", "primary_lift_progress": {}, "notable": "Week closed early due to elbow injury flag"}, "health": {"avg_sleep": 7.0, "avg_readiness": 65, "bw_trend": "stable"}, "escalations": ["elbow_pain_flag"], "patterns": {"recurring_concern": "Elbow pain 6/10 — second occurrence this month (weeks 5 and 7)", "behavioral_notes": ""}, "markov_note_for_next_week": "Elbow pain pattern: reduce pull volume, replace chin-ups with face pulls", "to_monthly": "Elbow pain flagged twice in month (week 5 + week 7) — pattern requires monthly attention"}
mock_llm_responses.monthly_eval_0: {"month": "2026-03", "closed": "2026-03-23", "training": {"weeks_completed": 2, "overall_quality": "moderate", "volume_trend": "stable", "strength_progress": {"Squat": "on track", "Bench": "on track"}, "notable": "Elbow issue emerging"}, "health": {"sleep_trend": "stable", "bw_trend": "stable", "readiness_trend": "stable"}, "escalations_handled": ["elbow_pain_flag_w5", "elbow_pain_flag_w7"], "patterns": {"key_insight": "Squat progression on target", "risk_flags": "Elbow pain flagged twice this month (weeks 5 and 7) — pattern emerging, recommend reducing pull volume by 20%"}, "markov_note_for_next_month": "Monitor elbow through April", "to_annual": "Elbow flags in weeks 5 and 7 of March — golfer's elbow pattern developing. Recommend annual arc review of pull volume.", "escalation_recommendation": "Reduce chin-up and pull-up volume by 20% for weeks 8-10. Replace with face pulls and band pull-aparts.", "escalation_adjustments": ["reduce_pull_volume_20pct"]}

expected_flaws: If close_day() escalation_check is not 'injury' despite elbow_pain=6 flag: deterministic injury check in Python is missing or not reading SESSION_FLAGS
If WEEKLY_SUMMARIES[-1].escalations does not contain 'elbow_pain_flag': weekly_eval failed to propagate the injury flag from daily summaries to weekly escalations field
If MONTHLY_SUMMARIES[-1].patterns.risk_flags does not mention elbow: monthly_eval failed to detect cross-week elbow pattern from two WEEKLY_SUMMARIES with escalations
